subcodes.first_line: O kind friend of old, Happy were the days we sat together in fellowship, in amity and affection. The charm of that meeting is still vividly remembered
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین مهربان خوشا ایامیکه بزم انس آراستیم و در نهایت محبت و الفت گفتگو
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @non-participation in politics, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
